name: @openconditions/probe-spike
description: NON-PRODUCTION feasibility spike: proves the DAP/VDAF probe-submission crypto invariants (one-hot segment enforcement, two-share confidentiality, token-bound admission, replay/one-hot rejection) against a maintained VDAF library. No production service may depend on this package — it pins a draft-09 DAP / draft-08 VDAF implementation that must never enter a production dependency tree.
